svg.title: Cadence transfer schematic for accepted 2BJT PPA design
svg.desc: Cadence-oriented detailed schematic for bjt2_sweep_ppa_rc120k_re3p9k_rb4p7m_c68n_cout10n_ch22p_r10k_c220p_ft250k. Includes nodes, instance names, pin order, values, models, buffer model, filter, load, performance, and PPA geometry notes.
svg.text: Cadence Transfer Schematic - Accepted 2BJT PPA Design
pins C B E S: b1_collector b1_base b1_emitter 0
pins C B E S: b2_collector b2_base b2_emitter 0
VDD=5 V, VCM=2.5 V, VIN AC=1 V
Signal path: vin - CIN - b1_base - Q1 - b1_collector - C12 - b2_base - Q2 - b2_collector - COUT - vout_drv - EBUF - vbuf - vfilt1 - vout_final
Use the node labels exactly when recreating the schematic in Cadence to simplify netlist comparison.
BJT pin order in netlist: collector, base, emitter, substrate
EBUF: ideal unity VCVS, or ahdlLib/opamp configured as follower
ROPAMP/COPAMP implement buffer output pole; IOPAMP models buffer power
CLOAD_10P is an external test load and is not part of amplifier PPA area
For schematic-vs-netlist checking, preserve instance names shown in the drawing.
Midband gain @ 1 kHz: 39.760102 dB, about 97.2 V/V
Lower cutoff: 12.569950 Hz; upper cutoff: 20409.380253 Hz
10 Hz relative loss: 4.396560 dB; 20 kHz relative loss: about 2.90 dB
Low-frequency slope 1 Hz to 10 Hz: +40.9971 dB/dec
High-frequency slope 100 kHz to 1 MHz: -80.5594 dB/dec
1 mV input transient output: 194.14 mVpp; output CM: 2.498256 V
XQ1 b1_collector b1_base b1_emitter 0 sky130_fd_pr__npn_05v5_W1p00L1p00 mult=1
XQ2 b2_collector b2_base b2_emitter 0 sky130_fd_pr__npn_05v5_W1p00L1p00 mult=1
Output buffer, filter, and PPA geometry notes
res_high_po_5p73: RC l=2124.193um, RE l=67.870um, RB_TOP l=83243.570um
res_high_po_5p73: RB_BOT l=17710.449um, ROUT l=177115.337um, RBUF l=175.911um
Dominant area: CIN + C12 = 1.66065886e8 p. External CLOAD_10P area is excluded.
